rag_rules: Assume statements must be placed in component types, not implementations
Implementation-level bindings like assignments should be in implementation scopes
generic_rules: AGREE diagnostics pointing to unresolved references should be fixed by using only visible identifiers from the current scope
Ensure type consistency in AGREE expressions: numeric variables must have numeric expressions, Booleans must have Boolean expressions
Component type contracts may only reference features visible at that scope; implementation-level guarantees must be moved to implementation annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Helper functions and constants must be declared before use and match available types in the model
anti_patterns: Do not place assume statements in component implementations; they must be in component types
Do not reference unresolved identifiers in AGREE clauses; always use visible identifiers from the current scope
